eval_cases.description: Real case: Europa Bar and Grill (listed name) is actually Europa Bar and Restaurant. Website is europabarandrestaurant.com. Discovery should find the website despite the name mismatch. Regression test from 07019 Restaurants workflow (2026-03-16).
